snow_or_rain_notes: Snow patches on the ridge for the first few weeks of May if winter had heavy snowfall
First spell of snowfall expected for last groups of November due to western disturbances

terrain_challenges: Steep ascent to Bali Pass requiring expert guide
Knife-edge ridge with deep valleys on either side
Huge boulder sections on climb to Advance Base Camp
Extremely steep descent beyond the pass
Long arduous day from Advance Base Camp to Lower Damini across Bali Pass
altitude_or_weather_risks: Bali Pass at 16,207 ft is one of the highest treks at Indiahikes
Risk of Acute Mountain Sickness (AMS) above 10,000 ft for any trekker regardless of fitness
Snow possible even in summer, increasing difficulty and potentially making pass inaccessible
Rain can turn trails slushy and unsafe

fitness_benchmark: Walk, jog, or run 10 km in under 60 minutes (minimum recommended fitness level)
Trekking primarily uses lungs, core, calves, glutes, quads, and hamstrings
Cardiovascular endurance and muscle strength are the two things to work on
approval_requirements: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date; without it you will not be allowed on the trek
Record at least 3 runs from the last 1 month that meet the trek's fitness criteria
Fitness profile must be linked and public; failure to link or to meet the required level at least three times in the past month may lead to rejection
prep_window: 6-week plan provided for those not currently active
General recommendation to start the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before the trek begins

experience_themes: Possibility of witnessing the rare alpenglow phenomenon
Lush green trail fresh from monsoon
Dramatic yellows and oranges hues in autumn
primary_watchouts: Bali Pass crossing is dependent on snow and weather conditions on the day of ridge crossing
Trek leader may decide to return if weather is bad or ridge is unsafe to cross
Steep ascent to Bali Pass requiring expert guide
Knife-edge ridge with deep valleys on either side
Huge boulder sections on climb to Advance Base Camp
Extremely steep descent beyond the pass
not_ideal_for: Trekkers unable to handle long ascents/descents and strenuous days

needs_review: not_ideal_for: 'First-time trekkers' is inferred from the AMS note rather than an explicit statement that first-timers should not do this trek; flagged for review.
